Evergreen Launch Case StudY:
OONAGH DUNCAN
Module 8
About Oonagh Duncan…
• Oonagh is the founder of “Fit Feels Good”
• She is a multi-award winning fitness expert,
author, and speaker on health - specializing in
helping busy women in their 40s
Market / Niche…
• Fitness, Fat Loss, and Awesomeness for Women
in their 40s and 50s
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Program…
• Transform Your Body and Health In 28 Days
Challenge
Background…
• I started by launching my signature program
once a month and did that for about a year and a
half with pretty good success but got absolutely
burnt out.
• I was always focusing on marketing so I couldn’t
service my clients and create new content the way
I wanted to.
• So then I experimented with closing my program
and only opening a few times a year - with the
assumption that those launches would be huge.
They weren’t and I almost went broke.
Background…
• I think that when people are feeling the pain of
wanting to deal with their fitness, they want a
solution NOW. They aren’t going to wait 3
months for their preferred trainer to offer that
program they had their eye on.
• So then I switched to an Evergreen Launch. The
reason I hadn’t done an evergreen before is
because a big part of my program’s effectiveness
is the live group element and I wasn’t willing to
give that up. So what we figured out is an
evergreen webinar that runs continuously and
sells the upcoming live program. We offer a new
start every 2 weeks.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
Overview of Evergreen Process…
• She put up a landing page and opt-in offer for a
webinar
Overview of Evergreen Process…
• Traffic is all paid traffic using Facebook ads
• Ads run all the time
• The webinar is offered within the half an hour and
then one in the evening and one the next day
• (The webinar is basically a Sideways Sales Letter
delivered in one presentation)
The Evergreen email sequence…
• Day 1: We are live! Come join us!
• Four hours later: here’s the replay
• Day 2: “It’s Not Your Fault” email recapping the
webinar content and offer
• Day 3:
• Email #1: Last Day (sneak Peek)
• Email #2: Ends tonight!
• Email #3: Final Chance!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
Launch metrics:
• Depending on the audience, she gets
registrations for between $1.37 to $3.70
CAD (still gathering data on which audiences are
most likely to CONVERT)
• The opt-in page converts at about 35%
• 32% of registrants show up live
• 16% show up to the replay
• 6.1% of total attendees convert at $197
Revenue assumptions based on fairly new
EG funnel:
• For a recent 30 day period, her traffic cost $3,138
CAD ($2,391 US)
• Total front end revenue is $8,865
• After, those 45 sales will usually convert to her
backend membership of $997 (or $1,200 with the
payment plan) at 35%
• If we assume that 15 people will upgrade and
choose the cheaper pay in full option, the upsell
revenue would be $14,955
• So anticipated total revenue would be $23,820
from an ad spend of $3,138 CAD ($2,391 US)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
